title: Italian Vegetable Sushi
description: A vegetarian friendly Italian dish featuring fish sauce and resinous flavors, shaped like nigiri for a unique twist on traditional sushi.
instructions: In a large bowl, toss the zucchini, eggplant, and portobello mushrooms with olive oil, garlic, and fish sauce until they are evenly coated.
Spread the vegetables out in a single layer on a baking sheet and roast for 20 minutes.
While the vegetables are roasting, prepare the sushi rice according to the package instructions.
Once the vegetables are done, let them cool to room temperature.
To assemble the sushi, lay a small amount of sushi rice onto a flat surface and shape into a nigiri shape.
Place a few pieces of the roasted vegetables on top of the rice.
Sprinkle shredded mozzarella cheese over the vegetables.
Garnish with chopped basil and serve immediately.
